author: samquill
title: Duplicate, Diverged CONFIDENCE_WEIGHTS — Batch Scoring Uses Different Values Than Canonical Definition
notes: Both definitions confirmed at snapshot 6eb2065. Canonical (scoring_constants.py): HIGH=1.0, MEDIUM=0.7, LOW=0.3 (dampening). Batch (batch/scoring.py): high=1.2, medium=1.0, low=0.75 (boosting). Different values AND opposite semantics. batch/scoring.py never imports from canonical source while 5 other files do. Feeds DimensionMergeScorer.issue_severity() which drives real holistic review scores. Not a style issue — this is a genuine consistency gap.
